add/beyond the safe-integer edge rounds.reason: Ruby Integer arithmetic is arbitrary-precision exact, not double-rounded

string/null renders as the string \"null.reason: deliberate: an unset prop must not surface a literal "null" in HTML

number/empty string coerces to 0.reason: deliberate: empty input must not silently zero downstream arithmetic

number/null coerces to 0.reason: deliberate: unset props must not silently zero downstream arithmetic

sort/localeCompare orders case-insensiti.reason: String#<=> is byte/codepoint order, not ICU collation (same barrier as Go/Perl)

sort/relational compare on numeric strin.reason: the shared "auto" compare goes numeric when both keys look like numbers (same catalogue as Go bf_sort / Perl BarefootJS::sort)

reduce/numeric-string items concatenate.reason: numeric folds parse numeric strings instead of concatenating (same catalogue as Perl bf->reduce)
